props.name: name
props.description: Identifier for the dropdown. Should be unique.

props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Defines how the selected value will be translated for the screen reader. If not specified it will fall back to the name.

props.name: ariaLabelledBy
props.description: The aria-labelledby attribute identifies the element(or elements) that labels the dropdown it is applied to. Normally it is the id of the label.

props.name: value
props.description: Stores the value of the item selected from the dropdown.

props.name: filterable
props.description: When true the dropdown will have the ability to filter options by typing into the input field.

props.name: leadingIcon
props.description: Icon shown to the left of the dropdown input.

props.name: maxHeight
props.description: Maximum height of the dropdown menu. Non-native only.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: The text displayed for the dropdown before a selection is made. Non-native only.

props.name: width
props.description: Overrides the autosized menu width. Non-native only.

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Sets the maximum width of the dropdown. Use a CSS unit (px, %, ch, rem, em).

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable this control.

props.name: error
props.description: Show an error state.

props.name: native
props.description: When true will render the native select HTML element.

props.name: size
props.description: Sets the size of the dropdown. Compact reduces height for dense layouts.

props.name: relative
props.description: @deprecated This property has no effect and will be removed in a future version.

props.name: mt
props.description: Top margin.

props.name: mr
props.description: Right margin.

props.name: mb
props.description: Bottom margin.

props.name: ml
props.description: Left margin.

props.name: autoComplete
props.description: Specifies the autocomplete attribute for the dropdown input. Native only.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: disableGlobalClosePopover
props.description: Prevents the popover from closing when clicking outside. Used for nested dropdowns or complex interactions.
